title: Light Modifier
description: Mod that lets you place and see light blocks in survival (Useful for events to use lights like guides for staff.)
body:
# Light Modifier
This mods lets you see light blocks in survival (Only if you have the light block in your hand)

This mods was originally made by @HewkawAr in Fabric. I just ported it to Forge 1.20.1

You are free to use it in your modpacks,events,etc...

# Features
- You can change the brightness from 0 to 15.
- Like vanilla Lights blocks these are full transparent and gives light
